case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. EDWARD F. RYAN et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RYAN, EDWARD F. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 320 CLEMENTINA ST. #404, S.F. CA. 94103, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT RYAN, EDWARD F.
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $7.76 FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT RYAN, EDWARD F. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT & PREJUDGMENT CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED NOV-12-2004, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RYAN, EDWARD F.
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT RYAN, EDWARD F.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT RYAN, EDWARD F.
